scenarios.description: children() returns cached Elements list on second call when multiple Element children exist
scenarios.precondition: Element has three appended Element children; shadowChildrenRef populated by first children() call
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() call returns same Elements instance with size 3 without rebuilding
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children cache-hit on multiple children

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds and returns empty Elements after all children removed and cache invalidated
scenarios.precondition: Element had one child appended and children() called to populate cache
scenarios.expectedResult: after el.empty(), children() returns size 0, showing cache invalidation and rebuild
pseudocode: TEST TC10 children rebuild after removal
